title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
jsonLd.skills: React, Rust, Go, Machine Learning, TensorFlow, Kubernetes, Agile/Scrum, Java
